mapper.select: select category_id, category_name, parent_id, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from project_category where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'

select category_id, category_name, parent_id, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from project_category where status = '0' and del_flag = '0' order by parent_id, order_num, category_name

select category_id, category_name, parent_id, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from project_category where del_flag = '0' order by parent_id, order_num, category_name
mapper.insert: insert into project_category (category_name, parent_id, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values (#{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update project_category set category_name = #{categoryName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from project_topic where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
